description: Split GCP HA guidance into infra-only and full automation examples for Trustgrid

userStories.title: Deliver infra-only GCP HA example (manual registration default)
userStories.description: As a platform team without Trustgrid API access, I want a Google-only HA example so I can deploy infrastructure and perform registration/configuration manually.
acceptanceCriteria: gateway-cluster-ha requires only hashicorp/google provider with version >= 6.0
Example deploys two gateway nodes in distinct zones with static external IPs
Example includes HA IAM/route and firewall resources including heartbeat TCP/9000
Default registration mode is manual and does not require license or registration key inputs
README explains how to enable automatic registration later when license key is available
All module source refs use semver tags (?ref=vX.Y.Z), never branch refs
userStories.notes: Existing gateway-cluster-ha path is retained and clarified as infra-only.

userStories.title: Add full GCP + Trustgrid HA automation example
userStories.description: As a team with Trustgrid API access, I want an end-to-end example that automates cluster and network config in Trustgrid in addition to GCP infrastructure.
acceptanceCriteria: New example directory gateway-cluster-ha-full declares both Google and Trustgrid providers
Includes tg_license per node, tg_cluster, tg_cluster_member
Includes tg_node online readiness gate with timeout before dependent config
Network automation includes node LAN route glue and cluster cloud_route behavior
All module source refs use semver tags (?ref=vX.Y.Z), never branch refs
userStories.notes: Implementation must sequence resource dependencies to avoid API race conditions.

userStories.title: Document split-path usage and migration guidance
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want clear docs that help users choose infra-only or full-automation paths and understand prerequisites.
acceptanceCriteria: gateway-cluster-ha README is explicitly labeled infra-only/manual-default
README includes migration/decision guidance for when to use gateway-cluster-ha vs gateway-cluster-ha-full
Full example README documents Trustgrid API credential prerequisites and post-apply checks
References in nearby docs/examples are updated to point to the correct HA example variants
userStories.notes: Preserve concise user journey guidance and security notes for sensitive values.
